positive: A serene watercolor illustration of a sleeping fox curled up in a patch of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The scene is set in an enchanted forest at twilight. Soft pastel colors, highly detailed, storybook aesthetic, Studio Ghibli inspired.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, oversaturation
